name: Black and White Fudge
recipeInstructions:
Black Part: Combine sugar, corn syrup, cocoa, and cream. Cook over medium heat until the mixture reaches a soft ball stage (234 - 238 F). Remove from heat and allow to cool to room temperature. Stir in butter and vanilla extract until creamy. Pour into a greased baking dish.
White Part: Prepare as for the black part. When both mixtures have cooled, beat them until creamy. Spread the white mixture over the top of the black fudge. If desired, sprinkle chopped nuts on top before cutting the fudge into small squares.
